compiled_state.title: commit workflow: deep tier sonnet reviewers dispatched in serial instead of parallel
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Bug details: During the commit workflow's deep tier review phase, the 3 sonnet deep reviewers (code-reviewer-deep-correctness, code-reviewer-deep-verification, code-reviewer-deep-hygiene) are dispatched one at a time (serial), not in parallel. CLAUDE.md rule says to parallelize independent tool calls always. These 3 reviewers are completely independent and should be dispatched in a single response as 3 parallel Agent tool calls. Serial dispatch triples the time for this phase unnecessarily. Fix: dispatch all 3 deep tier sonnet reviewers in a single message with 3 Agent tool calls.
comments.author: Test
